top.title: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support
top.summary: Leading conservative Catholics tell the BBC why they back the American pontiff in his spat with Trump.

top.title: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Powell if he doesn't leave in May
top.summary: Donald Trump's threat marks the latest escalation in his ongoing spat with Jerome Powell.

top.title: Nine killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
top.summary: Eight students and one teacher died in the attack, according to Interior Minister Mustafa Cifci.

top.title: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
top.summary: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.

top.title: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
top.summary: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.

top.title: Snapchat owner cuts 1,000 jobs as says AI will reduce repetitive work
top.summary: The Snapchat owner is laying off around 16% of staff and withdrawn hundreds of open job roles.
